backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages per-user favorite radio stations using a Principal-keyed map, exposing addFavorite, removeFavorite, and getFavorites as public shared functions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the 'SITUATION MONITOR RADIO' title update requirement to the files AppHeader.tsx and index.html, with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a quick-reference index of component and hook responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS defining Tailwind base styles and OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for both light (:root) and dark themes, covering background, foreground, border, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets the browser tab title to 'SITUATION MONITOR RADIO', preloads Google Fonts (Doto, Orbitron, Share Tech Mono), and mounts the React app at #root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wires together the radio player, search, station list, favorites, theme, and a RAF loop that reads AnalyserNode amplitude to drive the RadarWidget.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Header component rendering the fighter-jet logo, 'SITUATION MONITOR RADIO' title, an audio-reactive RadarWidget, a search toggle button, and STATIONS/SAVED view tabs.
Canvas component that renders 16 frequency bars from a Web Audio API AnalyserNode in phosphor-green/amber HUD style, falling back to a flat idle line when inactive.
frontend/src/components/BottomToolbar.ts: Persistent bottom toolbar providing play/pause/stop controls, a volume slider with mute toggle, a dark/light theme toggle, and a meatball menu popover with Share and About actions.
frontend/src/components/GaugeWidget.tsx: Empty file with no content; intended to hold a canvas-based circular gauge widget based on project summaries.
frontend/src/components/HUDLayout.tsx: Minimal pass-through layout wrapper that applies a dark OKLCH background color; all decorative HUD effects have been removed.
Displays the currently playing radio station's name, status label (ON AIR, TUNING, etc.), country, bitrate, and an audio visualizer, with visual states driven by playback and stream health props.
frontend/src/components/RadarWidget.tsx: Renders an animated canvas-based radar sweep widget whose speed and brightness react to playback state and audio amplitude, with blips shown during active playback.
frontend/src/components/SearchPanel.tsx: Provides a search UI with name input, quick-select genre tag buttons, and a country dropdown that fetches from the radio browser API, triggering onSearch callbacks on interaction.
frontend/src/components/StationList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of radio stations with play/loading indicators, animated signal bars for the active station, and favorite add/remove buttons, supporting both API and backend station types.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor or identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functions, status flags, and identity persistence via AuthClient, exposed through a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and removing favorite stations via the backend actor, plus a helper to convert API RadioStation objects to the backend Station type.
frontend/src/hooks/useRadioPlayer.ts: Custom React hook managing radio playback state including play/pause/stop, volume, stream health monitoring, auto-retry logic (up to 3 attempts with exponential backoff), and Web Audio API analyser node setup. Persists the last played station to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom React hook that manages dark/light theme state, persists the preference to localStorage, and toggles the 'light' CSS class on the document root.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a military HUD color palette (dark and light modes), and utility classes for HUD-themed text, panels, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/services/radioBrowserApi.ts: Service module providing typed async functions to interact with the Radio Browser API, including fetching top stations, searching by tag/country/name, listing countries and tags, and registering station clicks.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, HUD-specific colors, custom fonts (Orbitron, Doto, Share Tech Mono), border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations for accordion and blink effects.
project_state.json: Project state metadata document describing the app as a military cockpit-themed radio player ('SITUATION MONITOR RADIO'), tracking schema version, architectural decisions, existing features, and known issues.
